item.title: I'm Just a Bill: ACA Employer Mandate Modernization
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — ACA Employer Mandate Modernization

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

ACA employer-mandate modernization in the 119th Congress addressing documented coverage gaps and small-business administrative burden under the existing 50-FTE-employee mandate threshold.

What does it actually do?

  • Adjusts FTE threshold provisions
  • Cooperative-employer eligibility provisions
  • Substitution-class member-coverage interactions
  • Small-business administrative simplification

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Composes with cooperative-employer recognition (PSLF + Worker-Cooperative Tax Deferral Bounty Posters) + #7 MSA cooperative-class healthcare composing infrastructure.
